name: Spinach Dip#1
recipeIngredient: 1 package Frozen spinach, finely chopped and drained
1 small Can Water chestnuts, finely chopped
1 Round loaf of unsliced Pumpernickle bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl.
2. Chill the mixture for at least 30 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
3. Tear out the center of the bread and cut into bite-sized pieces.
4. Fill each piece with the spinach dip mixture.
5. Arrange the filled bread pieces on a serving platter.
6. Serve chilled.
